overview.about: Rijksmuseum is one of NL's most celebrated heritage landmark destinations, located in Amsterdam, NL. It captivates visitors with its extraordinary character, historical depth and natural beauty that has drawn travellers from across the world for generations.

highlights.label: Architectural Masterpiece
highlights.desc: Precision engineering predating modern tools — symmetry, scale and craftsmanship that continues to baffle experts today

highlights.desc: Structures standing for hundreds to thousands of years — each stone a silent chronicle of empires and civilisations

highlights.label: UNESCO World Heritage Site
highlights.desc: Recognised globally for outstanding universal value and protected as one of Earth's most significant cultural landmarks

highlights.label: Iconic Photography Spot
highlights.desc: Panoramic vistas, intricate carvings and sunrise silhouettes that appear on bucket lists worldwide — every angle tells a story

highlights.label: Architectural Masterpiece
highlights.desc: Precision engineering predating modern tools — symmetry, scale and craftsmanship that continues to baffle experts today

overview.about: Old Amsterdam Coastal Resort is one of NL's most celebrated beach paradise destinations, located in Amsterdam, NL. It captivates visitors with its extraordinary character, historical depth and natural beauty that has drawn travellers from across the world for generations.

highlights.label: Pristine Award-Winning Shores
highlights.desc: Crystal-clear azure waters fringing powder-white sands — consistently ranked among the world's most stunning coastlines

highlights.label: Premier Water Sports Hub
highlights.desc: Snorkelling, scuba diving, surfing and sailing in ideal conditions — equipment and instructors available year-round

highlights.label: Exceptional Sunset Views
highlights.desc: Catch the sky blaze in vivid gold and pink as the sun sets over the horizon — cited as a life-changing moment

highlights.label: Protected Marine Ecosystem
highlights.desc: Vibrant coral reefs, sea turtles and tropical fish — responsible tourism preserves these habitats for generations

overview.about: Royal Kinderdijk Ski Resort is one of NL's most celebrated mountain destination destinations, located in Kinderdijk, NL. It captivates visitors with its extraordinary character, historical depth and natural beauty that has drawn travellers from across the world for generations.

highlights.label: Awe-Inspiring Peaks
highlights.desc: Stand beneath peaks that pierce the clouds — some of the highest, most dramatic mountain ranges on the planet

highlights.label: World-Class Trekking Routes
highlights.desc: Legendary trails traversing alpine meadows, glacial passes and ancient shepherd paths used for centuries

highlights.label: Snow Adventures
highlights.desc: Skiing, snowboarding and ice-trekking on slopes that remain covered well into spring and summer months

highlights.label: Sunrise Panoramas
highlights.desc: Golden hour from high-altitude viewpoints paints surrounding valleys in colours no photograph fully captures

overview.about: Southern The Hague Plaza is one of NL's most celebrated city destination destinations, located in The Hague, NL. It captivates visitors with its extraordinary character, historical depth and natural beauty that has drawn travellers from across the world for generations.

highlights.label: Iconic Skyline & Architecture
highlights.desc: A skyline recognised across the globe — towers, bridges and boulevards that define an entire era of human design

highlights.label: World-Class Arts & Culture
highlights.desc: World-class museums, galleries, theatres and street art that shape global trends in fashion, film and music

highlights.label: Legendary Cuisine & Markets
highlights.desc: A melting pot of culinary traditions — street food, fine dining and bustling markets all within easy reach

highlights.label: Vibrant Nightlife & Events
highlights.desc: Rooftop bars, jazz clubs, night markets and international festivals keep the city electric long after dark

overview.about: Southern Amsterdam Lake is one of NL's most celebrated natural wonder destinations, located in Amsterdam, NL. It captivates visitors with its extraordinary character, historical depth and natural beauty that has drawn travellers from across the world for generations.

highlights.label: Biodiversity Hotspot
highlights.desc: Home to rare and endemic species — flora and fauna found nowhere else on the planet within pristine ecosystems

highlights.label: World-Renowned Trekking
highlights.desc: Trails from leisurely nature walks to multi-day high-altitude expeditions with breathtaking panoramic rewards

highlights.label: Wildlife Encounters
highlights.desc: Spot iconic wildlife in their natural habitat — guided walks dramatically increase sighting rates of rare species

highlights.label: Dramatic Natural Landscapes
highlights.desc: Awe-inspiring vistas of mountains, gorges, waterfalls and geological formations sculpted over millions of years
